title: Build a JSON Transformation API with Flask

content.problemStatement:
In this worked example, we are comparing regular data with json data.

### How does the code works:

1. When we run the application and land on the home page, we see the data of the dictionary is given as a string.

2. When we change the URL to `/api/data` we see the data in json format.



### Notes:

1. It is easy to extract the data in json format than in string format.
2. Json data is globally accepted in any language so data manipulation is easy.
